title: chromolaena frustrata
intro: Chromolaena frustrata, also known as Eupatorium, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to South America. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Chromolaena frustrata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Chromolaena frustrata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
